title: AICIF: Shettima, Metropolitan, Others Urge Africa to Leverage Islamic Finance for Inclusive, Sustainable Development - FinancialEDGE
description: Vice President Kashim Shettima and other economic Stakeholders have called on African nations to deepen the adoption of Islamic finance as a tool for inclusive and sustainable economic transformation across the continent. Represented by Dr Tope Fasua, Special Adviser to the President on Economic Matters, Shettima made the call while addressing delegates at the 7th
html: Vice President Kashim Shettima and other economic Stakeholders have called on African nations to deepen the adoption of Islamic finance as a tool for inclusive and sustainable economic transformation across the continent.
